---
title: "Events and JSON Output"
---

## JSON Output

```bash
qp check --json
qp guard --json
```

## NDJSON Events

```bash
qp check --events 2>events.jsonl
```

Event types include:

- `plan`
- `start`
- `output`
- `done`
- `skipped`
- `complete`
- `retry`
- `iteration`
- `approval_required`

Plan events include graph detail (`nodes`, `edges`).
